_S34_NOTE: S34 P2 batch — S30 audit P2 findings #16-#24 carry-forward from S33 (which shipped only P1 batch). 8 priorities in execution order (smallest/safest first → largest/riskiest last). P2-18 DROPPED per S33 PRIME-AUDIT pattern #audit-finding-can-be-false-positive-when-existing-comment-documents-intent — 'godly' BOND_SEVERED.cause already documented intentional back-compat at effects.ts:121-128 + world.ts:382 + audioManager.test.ts:155 type-shape retention. Standard tier Council R1 ran 2026-05-16 (Grok-4-1-fast DISRUPTOR + Gemini-2.5-flash AUDITOR). 4 Battle Ledger CLAUDE wins (P2-16 method, P2-18 dispo, P2-20 shape, P2-22b fix, P2-23 single delete) + 1 GROK adopt (P2-24 add integration test as stretch goal) + 2 UNANIMOUS (P2-21 defensive, P2-19 LOCKED doc). PRIME-AUDIT Δ1 integration-test feasibility caveat (stretch only, jsdom+Pixi mock infeasible without high cost), Δ2 drop attackRangeSq derived field from CreatureConfig (derive inline), Δ3 document P2-16 clear() one-frame-orphan rationale, Δ4 reaffirm P2-18 no-future-delete (Nostr snapshot consumers).

priorities.check_method: Verified: (1) (a) computeSpriteDelta extracted to creatureRenderer.ts above the class — @internal pure function, ids in current Set diff against ids in world Set yields toCreate + toRemove arrays preserving source insertion order; sync() orphan-removal branch refactored to consume the helper (semantic equivalence — replay-determinism test P1-12 STAYS GREEN); (2) (b) buildJitteredPolyline extracted to arcFlash.ts above drawArcFlash — pure function, takes seed + endpoints + segments + ampPx, returns {xs, ys} parallel arrays; drawArcFlash refactored to call it (3-pass stroke renderer shares the one polyline); (3) (c) computeAbortCleanupSteps DEFERRED per PRIME-AUDIT Δ1 — CutsceneOverlay.abort does cleanup ACTIONS not COMPUTATION (kill timers, remove sprites, abort fades), nothing pure to extract; documented in commit message as S35 carry-forward; (4) +8 tests on computeSpriteDelta (empty/empty, populate, drop, symmetric-diff, identical, insertion-order, Map.keys() iterator, dedup) + +7 tests on buildJitteredPolyline (length, endpoint-preservation, zero-length degenerate, determinism, different-seed-different-output, zero-amplitude straight-line, amplitude bounds) = +15 tests; (5) full suite 605 → 620 (+15); (6) save.replay.test.ts P1-12 byte-exact replay-determinism STAYS GREEN — empirical proof both refactors preserved jitter math; (7) tsc clean exit 0; (8) bundle 467.83 → 468.14 KB (+0.31 KB; 31.86 KB headroom on 500 KB cap; session total +0.68 KB from 467.46 baseline); (9) commit 27b71b1 +285/-29 LOC.
